title: Accident near Knysna estuary claims life
description: NATIONAL NEWS - A Nissan NP300 double cab...
bodyText:
Breaking News

NATIONAL NEWS - A Nissan NP300 double cab bakkie and a courier truck were involved in a serious accident on the N2 next to the estuary (lagoon) earlier today, 28 May.


> According to information gathered at the scene from reputable sources, the driver of the bakkie lost his life in the collision.


There were no passengers in the bakkie at the time of the accident.


> Read more online at the Knysna-Plett Herald


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
